title: Senior Software Engineer - Docplexus - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Docplexus - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
